name: Mobile Applications Development
description: Competitors must design and develop mobile applications for both Android and iOS platforms. The task involves UI design, API integration, and performance optimization.

name: Web Technologies
description: Competitors build responsive and dynamic websites using modern frameworks. Tasks include front-end development, back-end logic, and database integration.

name: Cybersecurity
description: Competitors demonstrate skills in identifying vulnerabilities, securing systems, and responding to cyber threats in real-world scenarios.

name: Cooking
description: Competitors prepare a variety of dishes showcasing culinary techniques, creativity, and presentation skills within a set timeframe.

name: Restaurant Service
description: Competitors demonstrate professional table service, wine knowledge, and customer interaction skills in a simulated restaurant environment.

name: Patisserie & Confectionery
description: Competitors create artistic pastries, cakes, and confections that combine technical precision with artistic flair and great taste.

name: Carpentry
description: Competitors construct wooden structures and furniture pieces using hand and power tools, demonstrating accuracy and craftsmanship.

name: Bricklaying
description: Competitors lay bricks and blocks to construct walls and structures, demonstrating precision, speed, and knowledge of building techniques.

name: Plumbing & Heating
description: Competitors install and maintain plumbing systems including pipes, fixtures, and heating equipment according to professional standards.
